para_trans: Regarding the inclusion of the Land Surveyor Cadre of the Land Records Division in the Preservation Geometers Cadre by declaring it dead.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Government Decision No.Synchronous-2029 / Q. No.42 / Aastha-6
First Floor, Main Building, Ministry,
Madame Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Mumbai-400 032
Date: April 8, 2026
Reference: Ma. The Cabinet of Ministers. Decisions of the meeting held on 01.04.2026.
The Proposal: -

The land records department mainly deals with land enumeration. During the British period, the original settlement work was done with the help of a cone chain. Then the counting has been done by the plane table, the theodolite machine. State-of-the-art technologies such as Global Positioning System (GPS) and Satellite Imagery have also been used in the state's re-counting project. The department is currently carrying out counting operations through state-of-the-art technology equipment such as rover and base station. Mathematical formulas in architectural engineering are used in all of the above types of counting. This calculation has to be done geometrically and mathematically by Garal A. Counting works fall under the important subject of land surveying in architectural engineering.

The subjects of surveying and advance surveying are taught for two years in engineering colleges. Geometers also have to work on a computer system called AUTO-CAD. It has been observed that the pay scale of employees of the Land Records Department and equivalent cadre of employees of other departments under the government is not uniform.

Since the staff of the land records department perform technical functions, the technical educational qualification of the staff of the land records department has been fixed by changing the service admission rules. Accordingly, the employees of Group-C cadre of the Land Records Department will be

Regarding the implementation of the revised pay scale. The Cabinet of Ministers. The decision has been taken in the meeting on 01.04.2026. Accordingly, the government has taken the following decision.
The Government's Decisions:

Revenue and Forest Department, Govt. According to the 02.05.2014, the admission rules of Class 3 employees of the Land Records Department have been changed to determine the educational qualification of a technical nature. Accordingly, the revised pay scale and the route of appointment to the posts at the level of Preservation Geometers and Preservation Geometers (Selection Grade) in the Land Records Department is being worked out as follows.
